calibration.cue: the position monitor alarms about a mismatch whenever we bet against a stock
calibration.designated_summary: Drift watchdog (cfa5634, CMCSA sprint) inverts SHORT positions: Alpaca's positions API returns qty ALREADY SIGNED ("-444" + side:"short"); getAllPosit

calibration.cue: removing the record from the lookup table too early meant a late confirmation reached the wrong owner
calibration.designated_summary: AlgoManager must never remove algos from maps until broker confirms fill or cancel — premature removal causes stale callbacks to route to wrong algo o

calibration.cue: a lost websocket acknowledgement leaves an order that can never be called off
calibration.designated_summary: "Alpaca REST reconcile recovers an order's status internally but does NOT propagate OPEN-order truth (NEW/placed) to the OrderManager → a dropped WS N
calibration.top1_summary: "Alpaca REST reconcile recovers an order's status internally but does NOT propagate OPEN-order truth (NEW/placed) to the OrderManager → a dropped WS N

calibration.designated_summary: Never act on a cancel (freeSlot, reuse, cleanup) until the broker confirms via onOrderCancelled callback. Critical for live trading with async executi
calibration.top1_summary: Issue 1 — inline cancel-send violates the broker-confirm methodology

calibration.top1_summary: Netting / Wash-Trade Guard — R2 + R3 Rework (ARM 2026-04-21)

derived.nomination_floor_basis: below the observed designated minimum; the designated and unrelated distributions OVERLAP, so no floor separates them - the floor is a volume cap only, the score ranks
derived.dedup_threshold_basis: CONSERVATIVE, and the corpus does NOT support a clean separation. Reading the labeled distinct-text pairs: true re-phrasings and false positives INTERLEAVE across 0.87-0.90 (true: 'Fix (landed)'/'Fix (applied)' 0.9208, the AI-attribution rule 0.8728, 'Task 39' 0.8724; false: 'ORB Sprint 5'/'ORB Sprint 7' 0.8970, 'Sources'/'Architecture' 0.8937). A short-text guard does not fix it - one false pair is heading-only (43/23 chars) but the other carries 567/1012 chars. D5 only PROPOSES a merge (a human confirms), so the threshold is set HIGH where the sampled evidence is clean rather than tuned for recall. Evidence is THIN at that height (1 content pair >= 0.92), so Stage 6 MUST hand-label a duplicate set to calibrate, and D6's per-criterion gate counters measure it in production.
derived.dedup_threshold_confidence: low - thin evidence, mixed band, revisit at Stage 6

corrections.dedup_0.85: WRONG, self-corrected. Derived from the top-2 pairs of each band, which were unrepresentative. The committed labeled pair list (this file) shows false positives inside 0.85-0.90. The C0 audit's demand that the labeled data be committed is what exposed it - the number moved because the evidence became checkable.
